name: Apple Music
description: Control the Apple Music app from Coco AI: play/pause, next/previous, volume, like the current track. Ported from the Raycast Music extension by fedevitaledev (MIT).

commands.name: Toggle Play/Pause
commands.description: Toggle play or pause of the current track in Apple Music.

commands.name: Next Track
commands.description: Skip to the next track in Apple Music.

args: osascript -e 'try' -e 'tell application "Music" to next track' -e 'end try'

commands.name: Previous Track
commands.description: Return to the previous track in Apple Music.

args: osascript -e 'try' -e 'tell application "Music" to previous track' -e 'end try'
osascript -e 'try' -e 'tell application "Music" to set sound volume to (sound volume + 10)' -e 'end try'
osascript -e 'try' -e 'tell application "Music" to set sound volume to (sound volume - 10)' -e 'end try'

commands.name: Like Current Track
commands.description: Mark the current track as loved/favorited in Apple Music.

args: osascript -e 'try' -e 'tell application "Music" to set favorited of current track to true' -e 'end try'

commands.name: Reveal Current Track
commands.description: Reveal the currently playing track inside the Apple Music app.

args: osascript -e 'try' -e 'tell application "Music" to reveal current track' -e 'tell application "Music" to activate' -e 'end try'
